name: Kaiser Permanente
description: Kaiser Permanente is an integrated managed care consortium, one of the largest not-for-profit healthcare plans in the United States.

name: ACCO Engineered Systems
description: ACCO Engineered Systems is one of the largest mechanical contractors in the Western United States, specializing in HVAC, plumbing, and other building systems.

name: Honeywell
description: Honeywell is a multinational conglomerate operating in aerospace, building technologies, performance materials and technologies, and safety and productivity solutions.

name: Bimbo Bakeries USA
description: Bimbo Bakeries USA is the largest bakery company in the United States, producing a variety of bread, buns, and sweet baked goods.

name: Infineon Technologies Americas
description: Infineon Technologies Americas is a subsidiary of Infineon Technologies AG, a global leader in semiconductor solutions for power systems and IoT.

name: Galpin Mazda
description: Galpin Mazda is an authorized dealership selling new and used Mazda vehicles and providing automotive services.

name: Infiniti of Van Nuys
description: Infiniti of Van Nuys is an authorized dealership selling new and used Infiniti vehicles and providing automotive services.

name: Paramount Pictures Corporation
description: Paramount Pictures Corporation is an American film studio that produces and distributes motion pictures and television programs.

name: Rhythm & Hues Studios
description: Rhythm & Hues Studios was an American visual effects and animation company known for its work in feature films.

name: Cerritos College
description: Cerritos College is a public community college offering associate degrees, transfer programs, and vocational training.

name: Glendale Community College
description: Glendale Community College is a public community college offering associate degrees, transfer programs, and vocational training.

name: Ritz-Carlton Los Angeles
description: The Ritz-Carlton Los Angeles is a luxury hotel offering upscale accommodations and amenities in downtown Los Angeles.

name: Beverly Hilton
description: The Beverly Hilton is a historic luxury hotel in Beverly Hills, California, known for hosting major events like the Golden Globe Awards.

name: California State Prison-Los Angeles County
description: California State Prison-Los Angeles County is a state prison facility operated by the California Department of Corrections and Rehabilitation.

name: Long Beach Police Department
description: The Long Beach Police Department is the municipal law enforcement agency for the city of Long Beach, California.

name: City of Los Angeles Information Technology Agency
description: The City of Los Angeles Information Technology Agency provides technology services and solutions to city departments and residents.

name: Source Photonics
description: Source Photonics is a leading provider of optical transceivers for data center, telecom, and access networks.

name: Distinctive Industries
description: Distinctive Industries manufactures high-quality automotive interior restoration parts for classic and vintage vehicles.

name: Herbalife Nutrition
description: Herbalife Nutrition is a global multi-level marketing corporation that develops and sells dietary supplements.

name: Southern California Permanente Medical Group
description: Southern California Permanente Medical Group is a physician-led organization providing medical care to Kaiser Permanente members in Southern California.

name: USC Engemann Student Health Center
description: The USC Engemann Student Health Center provides comprehensive medical, mental health, and wellness services to University of Southern California students.

name: Los Angeles County Military and Veterans Affairs
description: The Los Angeles County Department of Military and Veterans Affairs provides services and support to veterans and their families.

name: Tenet Healthcare Corporation
description: Tenet Healthcare Corporation is a multinational healthcare services company operating hospitals and other healthcare facilities.

name: UCLA Center for Autism Research and Treatment
description: The UCLA Center for Autism Research and Treatment (CART) conducts research and provides clinical services for individuals with autism spectrum disorder.

name: Adventist Health Glendale
description: Adventist Health Glendale is a hospital providing a range of medical services to the community of Glendale, California.

name: Centinela Hospital Medical Center
description: Centinela Hospital Medical Center is an acute care hospital providing comprehensive medical services in Inglewood, California.

name: Dignity Health-Glendale Memorial Hospital and Health Center
description: Dignity Health-Glendale Memorial Hospital and Health Center is a full-service acute care hospital serving the Glendale community.

name: Lighthouse Electric
description: Lighthouse Electric is an electrical contracting company providing services for commercial, industrial, and residential projects.

name: Aerojet Rocketdyne
description: Aerojet Rocketdyne is an American manufacturer of rocket, missile, and spacecraft propulsion systems.

name: Aerospace Corporation
description: The Aerospace Corporation is a federally funded research and development center providing independent technical and scientific research, development, and advisory services to national security space programs.

name: Glenair
description: Glenair is a manufacturer of interconnect components and systems for military, aerospace, and industrial applications.

name: Honda North America
description: Honda North America is the regional headquarters for Honda's operations in North America, overseeing manufacturing, sales, and research and development.

name: Technicolor USA
description: Technicolor USA is a subsidiary of Technicolor Creative Studios, a global leader in visual effects, animation, and post-production services for the entertainment industry.

name: ADP
description: ADP is a global provider of human resources management software and services, including payroll, benefits, and talent management.

name: Azusa Pacific University
description: Azusa Pacific University is a private Christian university offering undergraduate and graduate degree programs.

name: California State Polytechnic University, Pomona
description: California State Polytechnic University, Pomona (Cal Poly Pomona) is a public university known for its polytechnic and learn-by-doing approach.

name: California State University, Northridge
description: California State University, Northridge (CSUN) is a public university offering a wide range of undergraduate and graduate programs.

name: USC Viterbi School of Engineering
description: The USC Viterbi School of Engineering is the engineering school of the University of Southern California, offering various engineering disciplines.

name: Los Angeles County Fire Department
description: The Los Angeles County Fire Department provides fire protection, emergency medical services, and other public safety services to unincorporated areas and contract cities within Los Angeles County.

name: Los Angeles County Superior Court
description: The Los Angeles County Superior Court is the trial court of general jurisdiction for Los Angeles County, California.

name: California Access Scaffold
description: California Access Scaffold provides scaffolding rental, sales, and installation services for construction and industrial projects.

name: Kiewit Corporation
description: Kiewit Corporation is one of the largest construction and engineering organizations in North America, specializing in infrastructure, building, and mining projects.

name: Parsec
description: Parsec is a company that provides remote desktop software for gaming and professional applications.

name: Top Roofing
description: Top Roofing is a roofing contractor providing installation, repair, and maintenance services for residential and commercial properties.

name: Mitigation
description: Mitigation is a company specializing in disaster restoration services, including water damage, fire damage, and mold remediation.

name: Color Concepts
description: Color Concepts is a company that provides color management solutions and media profiling services for the digital printing industry.

name: Nissin Foods USA
description: Nissin Foods USA is a subsidiary of Nissin Foods Holdings Co., Ltd., a Japanese company known for inventing instant noodles.
